title: TNTMOD
description: Reinventing copper, introducing a powerful End ore
body:
TNTMOD is a game-changing Minecraft mod that introduces new materials, tools, and armor to enhance your survival and combat experience. This mod gives copper a real purpose and introduces a powerful new End ore that surpasses Netherite in strength!

Key Features:
🔥 Reinforced Copper – Tired of useless copper? Now, you can smelt and combine copper with iron to craft Reinforced Copper, a durable material used to create sturdy tools and armor with better durability than iron!

💎 End Ore – Deep within the End dimension, a rare and powerful ore awaits. Stronger than Netherite, this new material can be used to craft weapons, tools, and armor that offer unparalleled protection and efficiency.

⚒️ New Crafting Recipes – Utilize the new materials to forge unique gear that stands up to the toughest challenges in Minecraft.

💥 Enhanced Gameplay – With these additions, mining, crafting, and combat become more rewarding, giving you better progression and a reason to explore new dimensions.

Prepare to upgrade your arsenal, reinforce your armor, and dominate the End like never before.
